case_title: LORETTA LEE VS. KEVIN GROWNEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED

DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, LORETTA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. [HEARING: NOV-29-22 AT 1:30PM]
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $155) SERVED SEP-22-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BUI, LYNNA

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ON DEFENDANT UNION SQUARE DENTAL GROUP. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-29-2022 - DEFENDANT UNION SQUARE DENTAL GROUP CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1,397.10 (INCLUDE COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CHECK AND MAILED OUT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE DECEMBER 30, 2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT UNION SQUARE DENTAL GROUP WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. JUDGMENT IS ENTERED ON DEFENDANT LYNNA BUI. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506) HEARING SET FOR DEC-30-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2022 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURTS OWN MOTION TO MAR-01-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $135) SERVED SEP-22-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GROWNEY, KEVIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $67.50) SERVED SEP-22-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UNION SQUARE DENTAL GROUP
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [HEARING: NOV-29-22 AT 1:30PM] (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, LORETTA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-29-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-29-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF LORETTA LEE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT KEVIN GROWNEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYNNA BUI (DENTIST) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNION SQUARE DENTAL GROUP IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KEVIN GROWNEY, (OWNER & CEO). DEFENDANT KEVIN C. GROWNEY, DDS, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KEVIN GROWNEY, (OWNER & CEO). COURT ORDERS TO DISMISS 'KEVIN GROWNEY' AND 'KEVIN C. GROWNEY, DDS, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION' AS NAMED DEFENDANT WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT UNION SQUARE DENTAL GROUP CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1397.10 (INCLUDE COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CHECK AND MAILED OUT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE DECEMBER 30, 2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT UNION SQUARE DENTAL GROUP WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. JUDGEMENT IS ENTERED FOR DEFENDANT LYNNA BUI IN THE AMOUNT OF $3014.90 PLUS COST OF $192.50. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, LORETTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUI, LYNNA $3,014.90 PRINCIPAL, $192.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,207.40, DEFENDANT DR. BUI IS LIABLE FOR LEAVING A PIECE OF THE ORIGINAL TOOTH ROOT IN PLAINTIFF'S GUMS WHEN DEFENDANT PERFORMED AN EXTRACTION. DEFENDANTS KEVIN GROWNEY AND KEVIN C. GROWNEY, DDS, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS TO THE DEFENDANT UNION SQUARE DENTAL GROUP. CASE SETTLED PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEE, LORETTA AS TO DEFENDANT GROWNEY, KEVIN BUI, LYNNA UNION SQUARE DENTAL GROUP KEVIN C, GROWNEY, DDS, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBIT (PLAINTIFF - LORETTA LEE)FOR ZOOM HEARING - RECEIVED {HEARING: NOV-29-2022 AT 1:30PM}

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KEVIN C. GROWNEY, OWNER & CEO. FILED BY DEFENDANT UNION SQUARE DENTAL GROUP KEVIN C, GROWNEY, DDS, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION
NOTICE OF HEARING
SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNION SQUARE DENTAL GROUP. CASE SETTLED PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
